description: Implement market evidence micro-batch LLM research with default batchSize=3, concurrency=3, single-demand fallback, and an A/B comparison script.

tasks.title: Add market evidence batch agent API
criteria: Normalize ids and foreign keys in code

tasks.title: Wire micro-batch execution into pipeline and CLI
criteria: Use batchSize=3 and concurrency=3 by default
Fallback failed batches to single-demand calls
Expose CLI options for batch size and concurrency

tasks.title: Add A/B comparison script and tests
criteria: Script compares single vs batch on the same DB run demands
Report timing, evidence counts, and failures
